_doc: Recommended-model lists per cloud provider. Surfaced in the cloud picker as the dropdown half of the hybrid model field; free-text input remains the canonical path. Keyed by CloudProviderKind.rawValue. Missing keys fall back to the hardcoded defaults in CloudRecommendedModels.swift; empty arrays render as an empty dropdown (a deliberate user choice). User override at `~/Library/Application Support/Infer/cloud-models.json` replaces this file wholesale when present.
